name: LinkedIn Lead Generation and Automation
description: An automation tool that uses AI to identify and find LinkedIn leads tailored to the user's defined target market, facilitating outreach and lead generation.

inputs.name: product_description
inputs.description: A description of the product or service that the user offers.

inputs.name: target_market
inputs.description: Definition or characteristics of the target market to find relevant leads.

inputs.name: user_credentials
inputs.description: LinkedIn account login credentials or API access tokens required for automation.

inputs.name: search_criteria
inputs.description: Filters or parameters to refine lead search such as industry, location, job title.

outputs.name: lead_list
outputs.description: A list of potential LinkedIn leads identified based on the AI-driven search.

outputs.name: contact_actions
outputs.description: Automated actions taken on leads such as connection requests, messages sent.

outputs.name: report
outputs.description: Summary report of leads found and outreach activities performed.

patterns: AI-driven lead identification based on product and target market inputs
Automated LinkedIn interaction workflows (connection requests, messaging)
User input driven dynamic search and filtering
Data extraction and normalization from LinkedIn profiles
steps: User defines the product description and target market criteria.
The AI processes inputs to generate a profile of potential leads.
Search LinkedIn profiles matching the defined criteria using automation or API.
Extract relevant lead details and compile into a lead list.
Perform automated outreach actions such as sending connection requests or messages.
Generate and present a report summarizing leads and outreach status.
use_cases: Sales teams looking to automate lead generation on LinkedIn.
Marketing professionals targeting specific industries or roles for campaigns.
Recruiters identifying potential candidates fitting a profile automatically.
Entrepreneurs and startups finding potential clients or partners on LinkedIn.

prompt_templates.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Find LinkedIn leads for the product described as: '{product_description}' targeting the market: '{target_market}'.

prompt_templates.name: outreach_message_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate a personalized connection request message for leads in the '{target_market}' market about our product: '{product_description}'.
